titleStmt.title: SII 39.104: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 104. (A.R. No. 104 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SIVADHARMAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL JAṬĀVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA-8TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription records the sale of the Kārāṇmai right of certain temple lands to a native of Tiruppugalūr in Paṉaiyūr nāḍu, a sub-division of Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, which was a district of Chōḻamaṇḍalam. It also stipulated that the purchased waste land be brought under cultivation and pay the stipulated taxes. Refers to a tank called Pāvanaṅgakāranēri that was excavated in the name of Makkaṉāyaṉār alias Parākrama-pāṇḍyamahābalivānādhirāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koccaṭai paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 8 vatu meṣanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu trayotaciyum cevākkiḻamaiyum pe
ṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ puṟamalaināṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyil śrī paṇṭārattārum tāṉattomum coḻamaṇṭala
ttu kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭup paṉeyūṟ nāṭṭut tiruppukalūr malaiyā mutalikaḷil nelveli Uṭaiyāṉ tuṟai ṉ māṉ tiruvampalap perumāḷā
ṉa kaḷappāḷaṟku kārāṇmai vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricācāvatu Iṉṉāyanār tirunāmattukkāṇi Ūrārkkum ṭup paṟṟil cittirameḻi karumakka
ḷ mekaṟpuṭaiyār yaṟku Ikkāṭum Iraṇṭu kuḷamum Iṟakkik kaṭṭi nāyanār makkaṇāyarāṉa parākkirama pāṇṭiya mahābali vāṇātarāyan tirunāma
ttālp pāvaṉaṅkak kāṟaṉeriyeṉṟu Ivar veṭṭuvitta Ivveri valappuravil Ivarkku kārāmaiyāka peṟṟa cuntarapāṇṭiya Irupat
tu nālaṭikkolāl Irunūṟṟaimpattāṟu nilam Orumāvāka Aḷantiṭṭa nilam Eḻumāvukku Ellaiyāvatu Ivariyila per perāl vai
tat tirumayalap maṭaip pokkil kiḻ melāṉa vākkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai kaṇakkukka ma vaṭapāṟ kellai vaṭakaṭai
built in wall
Āka Iṉṉāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa puravu nilam Eḻumāvum vaṭakaṭantai
ṉilam Eḻumāvum kāṭuveṭṭi varappeṟaṭṭu meṭu paḷḷamum Okkaviṭṭut tirutti payir ceytu potuvatāka viṟṟa nilam Eḻumāvukkum kārāṇmai
vilai mutalāka nir ceyitta māttāl Irācip paṇam pattāka paṇam Eḻupatu Itil Ikkuḷam veṭṭiṭa Āḷ kūlikku vāṅkappaṭṭa Irācipaṇam nāṟpatum nācci yārtti
5 vāparaṇam paṇṇap poṉ koḷḷa vāṅkiṉa muppatum Āka paṇam Eḻupatuṅ Ippaṇam Eḻupatum kārāṇmai vilai mutalāka Iṉṉilam Eḻumāvum paṟṟi Aṉupoka
ppārākavum Ippaṭi Aṉupokikkum Iṭattu Iṉṉilattukku kaṭamai koḷḷa nicceyiṟta paṭi koṭṭārak kālālaḷa māttāl vāraṇattu nattukku pon_ 10 6 mum koṭaip
pokam Āṭikkuruvaikku māttāl pon_ varaku, Eḷḷu payarukku māttāl pon_ 5 100 9 10m vaḻutalai pūcaṉi Uḷḷiṭṭa puṉpayir ceyyumiṭattukku māt
tāl pon_ 4 100mum karumpu kokantiṉai mañcaḷ Iñci vāḻai Uṭpaṭa payiṟ nilattukku māttāl pon_ 2 100mum teṅku kamuku palā ttu E ccai Uḷḷiṭṭa maram vaittārk
kum kiṇaṟṟaṭiyilum cevarampilum vaittārkkum toḻiya toppākac ceyyum nilattukku māttāl kaṭamai mum Āka Ivvakuppiṉpaṭi pokatto
rum payir pāttu payir lattukku kaṭamai koḷvatākavum kācu kaṭamai Āṇṭoṉṟukku niṟcayiṟtta rācipaṇam Ikkuremum vayalum Iv
potukaiyil Ivaṟku māttāl kaḻitta paṇam Oṉṟu nikki Irukkum
paṇam Oṉṟāka vanta kaṭamai
vaṭakkut tiruvītiyil kka nāḷmaṉaikku meṟku Ite kāṇiyāka Iṭṭa maṉai Oṉṟiṉāl muḻam paṉṉiraṇṭum piḻaikkaṭaivāy nīḷamum kāṇi
yākap paṟṟi Eṭuttuk koḷvārākavum Ippaṭikku Immaṉaiyum kāṇiyum Innāḷ mutal cantirātittavati kāṇiyākap paṟṟik kaṭamai Iruttup potuvārākavum Ippaṭi viṟṟa I
nilam Eḻumāvāl vanta kāṇi camum mīṉum Innilattāl vanta samasta prāptikaḷum paṟṟi Aṉupavittu Ippaṭi niṟcayittu kaṭamai Iṟuttu Uṇṇa
veṇṭuvārkku Imaṉaiyum kāṇiyum viṟṟum Oṟṟi vaittukkoḷḷa peruvārākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu kāṇiviṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikku
ṭuttom tiruvampalapperumāṉ kaṭappāḷeṟku Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyil śrī paṇṭārattārum tāṉattomum Ippaṭi
ṭuttom tiru perumāḷāṉa kappāḷar Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷikku Uṭaiya na tirukkovilil śrī paṇṭārattārum tāṉattomum Ippaṭi
kku kalveṭṭik koṇṭu Aṉupavippārākavum Ippaṭikku Uṭaiyāṉ kaḷa pāḷa Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ellāṟkulai ṉa
Eḻuttu Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku virapāṇṭiya veḷāṉ Eḻuttu ṭuttavaṉ yati pātam rokkaṉār Eḻuttu
Built in wall
ṟkuṟikku cantiracekarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāṇi nāṭṭu hmātirāya taṟkuṟikku mātavaṭṭar
kāka velaḻakiyā Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kārāṇmai māṇamāḻitiṉeṉ Ikkoyiṟ kaṇakku pāṅkaḷuruṭaiyāṉ tiruku
Ippaṭikku vaṭa Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku peyepaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tevar
Digital edition of SII 39.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
